requirement_topic.en: Import Registration — SISCOMEX and LPCO Requirements

summary.en: All goods imported into Brazil must be registered through SISCOMEX (Sistema Integrado de Comércio Exterior — Brazil's integrated foreign trade system), administered by SECEX (Secretaria de Comércio Exterior) under the Ministry of Development, Industry, Commerce and Services (MDIC). Whether INMETRO compulsory certification is currently a confirmed condition of import specifically for EV charging equipment (EVSE) must be verified — no confirmed INMETRO compulsory scheme for EVSE could be established as of 2026-06-12. If such a scheme is in force, the Brazilian import declaration (Declaração de Importação — DI) would require evidence of valid INMETRO certification (Certificado de Conformidade), and products imported without a valid certificate could be blocked at customs. The applicable NCM (Nomenclatura Comum do Mercosul — Mercosur Common Nomenclature, based on HS codes) tariff classifications for EV chargers are: 8504.40.10 or 8504.40.40 (electric power supply units / static converters for EV charging), though the specific NCM should be confirmed with a licensed customs broker (despachante aduaneiro) as classification can vary by product configuration.
summary.zh: 所有进口巴西的货物须通过SISCOMEX（巴西综合对外贸易系统）登记，由开发、工业、商业和服务部（MDIC）下设的SECEX（对外贸易秘书处）管理。INMETRO强制认证是否作为电动汽车充电设备（EVSE）进口的已确认条件，须予以核实——截至2026年6月12日，未能确认专门针对EVSE的INMETRO强制方案。若相关方案有效实施，巴西进口申报单（进口声明）将要求提供有效INMETRO认证（合规证书）的证明，且未持有效证书进口的产品可能在海关被扣押。充电设备适用的NCM（南方共同市场共同商品名称，以HS编码为基础）税则归类为：8504.40.10或8504.40.40（充电设备用电源/静态转换器），但具体NCM归类应与持牌报关行（despachante aduaneiro）确认，因不同产品配置下归类可能有所不同。
summary.zht: 所有進口巴西的貨物須通過SISCOMEX（巴西綜合對外貿易系統）登記，由開發、工業、商業和服務部（MDIC）下設的SECEX（對外貿易秘書處）管理。INMETRO強制認證是否作為電動汽車充電設備（EVSE）進口的已確認條件，須予以核實——截至2026年6月12日，未能確認專門針對EVSE的INMETRO強制方案。若相關方案有效實施，巴西進口申報單（進口聲明）將要求提供有效INMETRO認證（合規證書）的證明，且未持有效證書進口的產品可能在海關被扣押。充電設備適用的NCM（南方共同市場共同商品名稱，以HS編碼為基礎）稅則歸類為：8504.40.10或8504.40.40（充電設備用電源/靜態轉換器），但具體NCM歸類應與持牌報關行（despachante aduaneiro）確認，因不同產品配置下歸類可能有所不同。

standards_or_laws: SISCOMEX — Sistema Integrado de Comércio Exterior (Brazil's integrated import/export registration system; mandatory for all imports)
Lei No. 9.279/1996 and INMETRO regulations — compulsory certification as import condition for regulated products
NCM 8504.40 — Static converters including EV chargers (Mercosul Common Nomenclature — confirm specific subheading with licensed customs broker)

summary.en: China's export customs process uses the HS classification system and China Customs commodity codes, with export licensing managed through GACC (General Administration of Customs of China). For EV charger exports from China, the HS code is typically 8504.40 (static converters). Chinese export documentation (customs declaration, packing list, commercial invoice, certificate of origin) does not substitute for Brazilian import SISCOMEX requirements — separate Brazilian import documentation in Portuguese is required. A FORM A (GSP certificate) may be available for qualifying products under Brazil-China trade arrangements, but should be verified with a licensed trade consultant.
summary.zh: 中国出口报关使用HS商品分类体系和中国海关商品编码，出口许可由中国海关总署（GACC）管理。充电设备出口中国通常适用HS编码8504.40（静态转换器）。中国出口文件（报关单、装箱单、商业发票、原产地证书）不能替代巴西进口SISCOMEX要求——须另行提供葡萄牙语巴西进口文件。符合条件的产品在中巴贸易安排下可能适用FORM A（GSP证书），但应与持牌贸易顾问确认。
summary.zht: 中國出口報關使用HS商品分類體系和中國海關商品編碼，出口許可由中國海關總署（GACC）管理。充電設備出口中國通常適用HS編碼8504.40（靜態轉換器）。中國出口文件（報關單、裝箱單、商業發票、原產地證書）不能替代巴西進口SISCOMEX要求——須另行提供葡萄牙語巴西進口文件。符合條件的產品在中巴貿易安排下可能適用FORM A（GSP證書），但應與持牌貿易顧問確認。

standards_or_laws: GACC export customs procedures — HS 8504.40 (static converters; applicable to EV chargers exported from China)
China Certificate of Origin (Form A / CCPIT certificate) — may be used for preferential tariff purposes; verify applicability under current Brazil-China trade arrangements

gap.en: Whether INMETRO certification is a confirmed precondition for SISCOMEX import clearance specifically for EVSE must be verified — no confirmed INMETRO compulsory EVSE scheme could be established as of 2026-06-12. SISCOMEX registration itself is mandatory for all imports regardless. Additional import considerations: (1) Brazilian import documentation must be in Portuguese; (2) a licensed Brazilian importer or distributor (importador) is required — direct import by a foreign manufacturer without a registered Brazilian legal entity is not permitted for regulated products; (3) Brazil applies import duties (II), IPI (industrial products tax), and ICMS (state goods and services tax) to EV chargers, increasing landed cost; (4) RADAR (SISCOMEX registration for importers) must be active for the Brazilian importing entity.
gap.zh: INMETRO认证是否作为专门针对EVSE的SISCOMEX进口清关已确认前提条件，须予以核实——截至2026年6月12日，未能确认专门针对EVSE的INMETRO强制方案。SISCOMEX登记本身无论如何均为所有进口的强制要求。其他进口注意事项：（1）巴西进口文件须为葡萄牙语；（2）须委托持牌巴西进口商或分销商（进口商）——受监管产品不允许境外制造商在未注册巴西法律实体的情况下直接进口；（3）巴西对充电设备征收进口税（II）、工业产品税（IPI）和州货物服务税（ICMS），增加到岸成本；（4）巴西进口实体必须在SISCOMEX中激活RADAR（进口商注册）。
gap.zht: INMETRO認證是否作為專門針對EVSE的SISCOMEX進口清關已確認前提條件，須予以核實——截至2026年6月12日，未能確認專門針對EVSE的INMETRO強制方案。SISCOMEX登記本身無論如何均為所有進口的強制要求。其他進口注意事項：（1）巴西進口文件須為葡萄牙語；（2）須委託持牌巴西進口商或分銷商（進口商）——受監管產品不允許境外製造商在未註冊巴西法律實體的情況下直接進口；（3）巴西對充電設備徵收進口稅（II）、工業產品稅（IPI）和州貨物服務稅（ICMS），增加到岸成本；（4）巴西進口實體必須在SISCOMEX中啟動RADAR（進口商註冊）。

mandatory_status.target: SISCOMEX registration mandatory for all imports; whether valid INMETRO certification is a confirmed legal precondition for EVSE import clearance must be verified — not confirmed compulsory as of 2026-06-12
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — China's GACC export customs process applies on the Chinese side; does not substitute for Brazilian import requirements

source.publisher: MDIC — Ministério do Desenvolvimento, Indústria, Comércio e Serviços (Brazil)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — UNCONFIRMED] SISCOMEX registration is mandatory for all Brazil imports. Whether a valid INMETRO Certificado de Conformidade is a confirmed precondition for EVSE import clearance must be verified at portaria.inmetro.gov.br — this could not be confirmed as of 2026-06-12. A licensed Brazilian importer must handle import customs. Portuguese-language documentation is required. Import duties (II, IPI, ICMS) apply and materially affect landed cost. NCM classification should be confirmed with a licensed customs broker.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考——未经确认】SISCOMEX登记为所有巴西进口的强制要求。有效INMETRO合规证书是否为EVSE进口清关的已确认前提条件，须在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核实——截至2026年6月12日未能确认。进口报关须由持牌巴西进口商办理。文件须为葡萄牙语。进口税（II、IPI、ICMS）适用，实质性影响到岸成本。NCM归类应与持牌报关行确认。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考——未經確認】SISCOMEX登記為所有巴西進口的強制要求。有效INMETRO合規證書是否為EVSE進口清關的已確認前提條件，須在portaria.inmetro.gov.br核實——截至2026年6月12日未能確認。進口報關須由持牌巴西進口商辦理。文件須為葡萄牙語。進口稅（II、IPI、ICMS）適用，實質性影響到岸成本。NCM歸類應與持牌報關行確認。

requirement_topic.en: Brazilian Product Labelling — Portuguese Language Requirements and INMETRO Mark
requirement_topic.zh: 巴西产品标签——葡萄牙语要求及INMETRO标志
requirement_topic.zht: 巴西產品標籤——葡萄牙語要求及INMETRO標誌

summary.en: Products sold in Brazil must carry labelling in Portuguese (Brazilian Portuguese — Português do Brasil). For EV charging equipment, the label must include: (1) the INMETRO conformity mark (Marca de Conformidade INMETRO) or reference to the Certificado de Conformidade number; (2) manufacturer name and Brazilian importer/representative information; (3) electrical ratings (voltage: 127 V / 220 V, frequency: 60 Hz, current rating, power rating) in Portuguese; (4) for wireless-enabled chargers, the Anatel homologation number; (5) safety warnings in Portuguese; (6) country of origin. The Código de Defesa do Consumidor (Consumer Defence Code — Lei No. 8.078/1990) requires all product information to be provided in Portuguese for consumer goods sold in Brazil.
summary.zh: 在巴西销售的产品须使用葡萄牙语（巴西葡萄牙语）标注。对于充电设备，标签须包含：（1）INMETRO合格标志（INMETRO符合性标志）或合规证书编号引用；（2）制造商名称及巴西进口商/代表信息；（3）葡萄牙语电气额定值（电压：127V/220V，频率：60Hz，额定电流，额定功率）；（4）对于无线充电设备，须注明Anatel型号认证编号；（5）葡萄牙语安全警告；（6）原产地。《消费者保护法》（第8.078/1990号法律）要求巴西销售的消费品的所有产品信息均须以葡萄牙语提供。
summary.zht: 在巴西銷售的產品須使用葡萄牙語（巴西葡萄牙語）標注。對於充電設備，標籤須包含：（1）INMETRO合格標誌（INMETRO符合性標誌）或合規證書編號引用；（2）製造商名稱及巴西進口商/代表信息；（3）葡萄牙語電氣額定值（電壓：127V/220V，頻率：60Hz，額定電流，額定功率）；（4）對於無線充電設備，須注明Anatel型號認證編號；（5）葡萄牙語安全警告；（6）原產地。《消費者保護法》（第8.078/1990號法律）要求巴西銷售的消費品的所有產品信息均須以葡萄牙語提供。

standards_or_laws: Lei No. 8.078/1990 — Código de Defesa do Consumidor (Consumer Defence Code — mandates Portuguese labelling for products sold in Brazil)
INMETRO labelling requirements — Certificado de Conformidade number or INMETRO mark on product label (per applicable INMETRO Portaria for EV charging equipment)
Anatel Resolução No. 715/2019 — Requires Anatel homologation number on label of products with wireless modules

summary.en: Chinese products destined for domestic sale carry Chinese-language labelling under GB 191 (Packaging — Pictorial markings for handling) and product-specific GB labelling standards. For export, Chinese manufacturers are responsible for compliance with destination-country labelling requirements. Chinese-language-only labels or labels using Chinese-specific regulatory marks (CCC mark, CQC mark) are not acceptable for the Brazilian market. The INMETRO mark and Anatel homologation number are Brazil-specific requirements with no Chinese equivalent.
summary.zh: 国内销售的中国产品依据GB 191（包装——储运图示标志）和产品专用GB标签标准使用中文标签。对于出口产品，中国制造商有责任符合目的国标签要求。仅使用中文标签或含有中国特定监管标志（CCC标志、CQC标志）的标签不被巴西市场接受。INMETRO标志和Anatel型号认证编号是巴西特有要求，在中国没有对应项。
summary.zht: 國內銷售的中國產品依據GB 191（包裝——儲運圖示標誌）和產品專用GB標籤標準使用中文標籤。對於出口產品，中國製造商有責任符合目的國標籤要求。僅使用中文標籤或含有中國特定監管標誌（CCC標誌、CQC標誌）的標籤不被巴西市場接受。INMETRO標誌和Anatel型號認證編號是巴西特有要求，在中國沒有對應項。

standards_or_laws: GB 191-2008 — Packaging — Pictorial markings for handling (Chinese export labelling reference; does not substitute for Brazilian requirements)
SAMR/CNCA CCC mark requirements — Chinese mandatory certification mark; not valid in Brazil

gap.en: Chinese EV charger labels are in Chinese and carry Chinese regulatory marks (CCC, CQC) that are not recognised in Brazil. For Brazilian market entry, exporters must: (1) produce new labels in Brazilian Portuguese meeting all INMETRO, Anatel, and Consumer Code requirements; (2) display the INMETRO mark from the Certificado de Conformidade; (3) list the Brazilian importer's name and address; (4) show voltage and frequency ratings for Brazilian grid (127 V / 220 V, 60 Hz) — which also reflects the hardware must be adapted for 60 Hz; (5) include Anatel homologation number if wireless modules are present. Labels should be reviewed by a local Brazilian compliance consultant to ensure full Consumer Code compliance.
gap.zh: 中国充电设备标签使用中文，并带有在巴西不被认可的中国监管标志（CCC、CQC）。进入巴西市场，出口商须：（1）制作符合所有INMETRO、Anatel及消费者法规要求的巴西葡萄牙语新标签；（2）展示合规证书中的INMETRO标志；（3）列明巴西进口商名称和地址；（4）标注巴西电网电压和频率额定值（127V/220V，60Hz）——这也反映了设备须适配60Hz的硬件要求；（5）如含无线模块，须注明Anatel型号认证编号。标签应由巴西本地合规顾问审核，以确保完全符合消费者保护法要求。
gap.zht: 中國充電設備標籤使用中文，並帶有在巴西不被認可的中國監管標誌（CCC、CQC）。進入巴西市場，出口商須：（1）制作符合所有INMETRO、Anatel及消費者法規要求的巴西葡萄牙語新標籤；（2）展示合規證書中的INMETRO標誌；（3）列明巴西進口商名稱和地址；（4）標注巴西電網電壓和頻率額定值（127V/220V，60Hz）——這也反映了設備須適配60Hz的硬體要求；（5）如含無線模組，須注明Anatel型號認證編號。標籤應由巴西本地合規顧問審核，以確保完全符合消費者保護法要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Portuguese labelling legally required under the Consumer Defence Code for products sold in Brazil; INMETRO mark required only if a confirmed INMETRO compulsory scheme for EVSE is in force (verify portaria scope); Anatel homologation number required only if wireless module present
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic sales — Chinese-language labelling with CCC mark required; entirely separate from Brazilian requirements

source.publisher: Planalto.gov.br — Presidência da República (Brazil) — official consolidated text of Lei No. 8.078/1990

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazilian product labelling must be in Portuguese and must carry the INMETRO conformity mark (or certificate number reference) and Anatel homologation number (if wireless-enabled). Chinese-language labels with CCC marks are not accepted. Labelling must reflect Brazilian electrical ratings (127 V / 220 V, 60 Hz). Review by a local Brazilian compliance consultant is strongly recommended before printing production labels.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】巴西产品标签须为葡萄牙语，须标注INMETRO合格标志（或证书编号引用）及Anatel型号认证编号（如含无线功能）。带有CCC标志的中文标签不被接受。标签须反映巴西电气额定值（127V/220V，60Hz）。强烈建议在印制量产标签前委托巴西本地合规顾问审核。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】巴西產品標籤須為葡萄牙語，須標注INMETRO合格標誌（或證書編號引用）及Anatel型號認證編號（如含無線功能）。帶有CCC標誌的中文標籤不被接受。標籤須反映巴西電氣額定值（127V/220V，60Hz）。強烈建議在印製量產標籤前委託巴西本地合規顧問審核。
